title: botrychium minus
intro: Botrychium minus, also known as small rattlesnake fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Osmundaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Botrychium minus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making teas or infusions from its roots and leaves, which are then used to harness its medicinal properties.
